entries.translation: Notice("保存 Codex 技能失败")
Notice("删除 Codex 技能失败")
Notice(`Codex 技能 "$${entry.name}" 已${existing ? "更新" : "创建"}`)

entries.key: Notice("Failed to steer the queued Codex message. It is still available.")
entries.translation: Notice("操作排队的 Codex 消息失败，该消息仍然可用。")

entries.key: description: "OpenCode wants to run a shell command."
entries.translation: description: "OpenCode 想要执行一条 shell 命令。"

entries.key: description: "OpenCode wants to search indexed code outside the active buffer."
entries.translation: description: "OpenCode 想要搜索当前缓冲区以外的索引代码。"

entries.key: description: "OpenCode wants to scan file paths with a glob pattern."
entries.translation: description: "OpenCode 想要使用 glob 模式扫描文件路径。"

entries.key: description: "OpenCode wants to search file contents with a pattern."
entries.translation: description: "OpenCode 想要搜索匹配模式的文件内容。"

entries.key: description: "OpenCode wants to query language server data."
entries.translation: description: "OpenCode 想要查询语言服务器数据。"

entries.key: description: "OpenCode wants to switch this session into planning mode."
entries.translation: description: "OpenCode 想要将当前会话切换到规划模式。"

entries.key: description: "OpenCode wants to leave planning mode and resume implementation."
entries.translation: description: "OpenCode 想要退出规划模式并继续实现。"

entries.key: description: "OpenCode wants to ask you a direct question before continuing."
entries.translation: description: "OpenCode 想在继续之前直接问你一个问题。"

entries.key: description: "OpenCode wants to load a skill into the current session."
entries.translation: description: "OpenCode 想要加载一个技能到当前会话。"

entries.key: description: "OpenCode wants to update the shared task list."
entries.translation: description: "OpenCode 想要更新共享任务列表。"

entries.key: description: "OpenCode wants to fetch content from a URL."
entries.translation: description: "OpenCode 想要从 URL 获取内容。"

entries.key: description: "OpenCode wants to search the web."
description: "Internal Claudian read-only agent for OpenCode auxiliary tasks."
entries.translation: description: "用于 OpenCode 辅助任务的 Claudian 内部只读代理。"

entries.key: description: "Internal Claudian no-tool agent for OpenCode auxiliary tasks."
entries.translation: description: "用于 OpenCode 辅助任务的 Claudian 内部无工具代理。"

entries.key: text: "Manage vault-level Codex skills stored in .codex/skills/ or .agents/skills/. Home-level skills are excluded here."
entries.translation: text: "管理存储在 .codex/skills/ 或 .agents/skills/ 的仓库级 Codex 技能。此处不显示主目录级别的技能。"

entries.key: text: "Manage vault-level Codex subagents stored in .codex/agents/. Each TOML file defines one custom agent."
entries.translation: text: "管理存储在 .codex/agents/ 的仓库级 Codex 子代理。每个 TOML 文件定义一个自定义代理。"

entries.key: text: "OpenCode can auto-detect vault-level Claude slash commands from .claude/commands/ and skills from .claude/skills/, .codex/skills/, and .agents/skills/. Manage those entries in the Claude or Codex settings tab. This setting only hides entries from the OpenCode dropdown."
entries.translation: text: "OpenCode 可以从 .claude/commands/ 自动检测仓库级 Claude 斜杠命令，以及从 .claude/skills/、.codex/skills/ 和 .agents/skills/ 检测技能。请在 Claude 或 Codex 设置标签页中管理这些条目。此设置仅从 OpenCode 下拉菜单中隐藏条目。"

entries.key: text: "Manage vault-level OpenCode subagents from .opencode/agent/ and legacy .opencode/agents/. New entries are saved as subagent-only files and appear in the @mention menu."
entries.translation: text: "从 .opencode/agent/ 和旧版 .opencode/agents/ 管理仓库级 OpenCode 子代理。新条目保存为仅子代理文件，显示在 @提及 菜单中。"

entries.key: setText("No Codex skills in vault. Click + to create one.")
entries.translation: setText("仓库中没有 Codex 技能。点击 + 创建。")

entries.key: setText("No Codex subagents in vault. Click + to create one.")
entries.translation: setText("仓库中没有 Codex 子代理。点击 + 创建。")

entries.key: setText("No OpenCode subagents in vault. Click + to create one.")
entries.translation: setText("仓库中没有 OpenCode 子代理。点击 + 创建。")

entries.key: setDesc("Agent name Codex uses when spawning (lowercase, hyphens, underscores)")
entries.translation: setDesc("Codex 启动时使用的代理名称（小写、连字符、下划线）")

entries.key: setDesc("When Codex should use this agent")
entries.translation: setDesc("Codex 何时应使用此代理")

entries.key: setDesc("How Claudian should launch Codex on Windows. Native Windows uses a Windows executable path. WSL launches the Linux CLI inside a selected distro.")
entries.translation: setDesc("Claudian 应如何在 Windows 上启动 Codex。原生 Windows 使用 Windows 可执行文件路径，WSL 在所选发行版中启动 Linux CLI。")

entries.key: setDesc("Append additional Codex model IDs to the picker, one per line. OPENAI_MODEL still takes precedence when set.")
entries.translation: setDesc("将额外的 Codex 模型 ID 追加到选择器中，每行一个。设置 OPENAI_MODEL 后仍优先使用。")

entries.key: setDesc("OpenCode agent name. Use slash-separated segments for nested agents.")
entries.translation: setDesc("OpenCode 代理名称。使用斜杠分隔段表示嵌套代理。")

entries.key: setDesc("When OpenCode should use this subagent")
entries.translation: setDesc("OpenCode 何时应使用此子代理")
setDesc("将 `opencode acp` 作为提供商启动。")

entries.key: setDesc("Optional absolute path to the OpenCode CLI for this computer. Leave empty to use `opencode` from PATH.")
entries.translation: setDesc("此计算机上 OpenCode CLI 的可选绝对路径。留空则使用 PATH 中的 `opencode`。")

entries.key: setDesc("Choose which OpenCode models appear in the chat selector. Filter by provider or type to search. The current session model stays pinned even if it is not selected here.")
entries.translation: setDesc("选择哪些 OpenCode 模型出现在聊天选择器中。按提供商或类型过滤搜索。即使当前会话模型未在此处选择，也会保持固定。")

entries.key: appendText("Codex manages MCP servers via its own CLI. Configure with ")
entries.translation: appendText("Codex 通过自身的 CLI 管理 MCP 服务器。配置方法：")
name: "加载用户 Claude 设置"
name: "新建会话（在当前标签中）"

entries.key: description: "Meta-schema for $data reference (JSON AnySchema extension proposal)"
entries.translation: description: "$data 引用的元模式（JSON AnySchema 扩展提案）"

entries.key: description: "The default agent. Executes tools based on configured permissions."
entries.translation: description: "默认代理。根据配置的权限执行工具。"

entries.key: description: "Safe mode. Asks before shell commands and file edits."
entries.translation: description: "安全模式。执行 shell 命令和文件编辑前询问。"

entries.key: description: "Plan mode. Disallows all edit tools."
entries.translation: description: "计划模式。禁止所有编辑工具。"
description: "性能均衡（1M 上下文窗口）"
description: "能力最强（1M 上下文窗口）"

entries.key: description: "Approve and store an exec policy amendment."
entries.translation: description: "批准并存储执行策略修订。"

entries.key: description: "Fork entire conversation to new session"
entries.translation: description: "复制整个对话到新会话"

entries.key: setText("No tools information available. Tools will be loaded when used in chat.")
entries.translation: setText("没有可用的工具信息。工具将在聊天中使用时加载。")

entries.key: setText('No MCP servers configured. Click "Add" to add one.')
setText("No Claude Code plugins found. Enable plugins via the Claude CLI.")
entries.translation: setText("未找到 Claude Code 插件。请通过 Claude CLI 启用插件。")

entries.key: setText("No commands or skills configured. Click + to create one.")
entries.translation: setText("未配置命令或技能。点击 + 创建。")
setDesc("此服务器的唯一标识符")

entries.key: setDesc("Hide tools from agent unless @-mentioned (saves context window)")
entries.translation: setDesc("除非 @提及，否则对代理隐藏工具（节省上下文窗口）")
setDesc("可选描述，显示在下拉菜单中")

entries.key: setDesc("Optional model to use for this command")
entries.translation: setDesc("此命令使用的可选模型")

entries.key: setDesc("Comma-separated list of tools to allow (empty = all)")
entries.translation: setDesc("逗号分隔的允许工具列表（空 = 全部）")

entries.key: setDesc("Prevent the model from invoking this command itself")
entries.translation: setDesc("阻止模型自行调用此命令")

entries.key: setDesc("Prevent the user from invoking this skill directly")
entries.translation: setDesc("阻止用户直接调用此技能")

entries.key: setDesc("Subagent type when context is fork")
entries.translation: setDesc("上下文为 fork 时的子代理类型")

entries.key: setDesc("Comma-separated display nicknames (e.g., Atlas, Delta, Echo)")
entries.translation: setDesc("逗号分隔的显示昵称（例如 Atlas、Delta、Echo）")

entries.key: setDesc("Core instructions that define the agent's behavior")
entries.translation: setDesc("定义代理行为的核心指令")

entries.key: setDesc("Optional advanced override. Leave empty to infer the distro from a \\\\wsl$ workspace path when possible, otherwise use the default WSL distro.")
entries.translation: setDesc("可选高级覆盖。留空则尽可能从 \\\\\\\\wsl$ 工作区路径推断发行版，否则使用默认 WSL 发行版。")

entries.key: setDesc("Show a summary of the model's reasoning process in the thinking block.")
entries.translation: setDesc("在思考块中显示模型推理过程的摘要。")
setDesc("十六进制颜色或主题令牌")

entries.key: setDesc("Maximum agentic iterations before forcing text-only output")
entries.translation: setDesc("强制纯文本输出前的最大代理迭代次数")

entries.key: setDesc("Hide this subagent from the @ autocomplete menu")
entries.translation: setDesc("从 @ 自动补全菜单中隐藏此子代理")

entries.key: setDesc("Disable the agent without deleting the file")
entries.translation: setDesc("禁用代理而不删除文件")

entries.key: setDesc("Markdown body used as the agent prompt")
entries.translation: setDesc("用作代理提示词的 Markdown 正文")

entries.key: setPlaceholder("Reviews code for correctness and security")
entries.translation: setPlaceholder("审查代码的正确性和安全性")

entries.key: setPlaceholder("Reviews code for correctness and maintainability")
entries.translation: setPlaceholder("审查代码的正确性和可维护性")

entries.key: setPlaceholder("map w scrollUp\nmap s scrollDown\nmap i focusInput")
setDesc("When enabled, Codex models appear in the model selector for new conversations. Existing Codex sessions are preserved.")
entries.translation: setDesc("启用后，Codex 模型会出现在新对话的模型选择器中。现有 Codex 会话保持不变。")
